first_run.rationale: The reasoning in both evaluations is substantively identical. They both correctly identify the same core skills gap: a lack of recent, deep C++ experience and no background in the required industrial automation domain (MQTT, IEC 62443). The change in the candidate's work location from various Western cities to Brazil did not alter this core assessment. The slight rewording and the one-point score drop fall within the range of expected run-to-run noise and are not accompanied by any new, location-based concerns.
